status: INITIAL PROMPT REFERENCE - This document contains the original prompt templates and free tool overview from the initial planning phase. The living, production-ready prompt system now lives in docs/assets/. See 'current_references' below for the mapping.
purpose:
Ready-to-use prompts for AI image generation tools (Midjourney, DALL-E 3, Stable Diffusion) to create consistent game assets.

IMPORTANT: For the current modular prompt assembly system (with Body Scale Lock, Effect Boundary, Gender/Body Lock, Reference Frame), see docs/assets/01_PRODUCTION_SYSTEM/02_PROMPT_MODULE_SYSTEM.md and docs/assets/01_PRODUCTION_SYSTEM/03_HERO_RARITY_ATLAS_FACTORY.md.
For already validated, working production prompts, see docs/assets/02_POC/ (e.g. HUMAN_WARRIOR_V3.md).

style_guide_summary.art_style: Fantasy 3D-rendered 2D, soft lighting, rich colors, clean transparent backgrounds
consistency_rules: Always use --style raw or equivalent for less 'artistic' interpretation
Same seed range for batches (e.g., --s 250 for Midjourney)
Consistent aspect ratio: --ar 1:1 for units, --ar 16:9 for backgrounds
Include 'transparent background, game asset, isolated subject' in every prompt

prompt_templates.note: These templates from the initial plan are kept as conceptual foundation. For the actual production-ready modular prompt system with atlas format, reference frame, Body Scale Lock, Effect Boundary, and Gender/Body Lock, use docs/assets/01_PRODUCTION_SYSTEM/02_PROMPT_MODULE_SYSTEM.md instead.

unit_portrait.template: 3D render of a fantasy {unit_class} character, {faction} faction, {rarity} quality, {description}, wearing {armor_type}, holding {weapon_type}, dynamic pose, soft studio lighting, transparent background, game asset, isolated subject, high detail, 4K --ar 1:1 --style raw --v 6

examples.name: Human Warrior (Common)
examples.prompt: 3D render of a fantasy warrior character, human faction, common quality, young male with short brown hair, wearing leather armor, holding a steel sword and wooden shield, standing guard pose, soft studio lighting, transparent background, game asset, isolated subject, high detail, 4K --ar 1:1 --style raw --v 6

examples.name: Elf Ranger (Rare)
examples.prompt: 3D render of a fantasy ranger character, elf faction, rare quality, female with long silver hair and pointed ears, wearing green cloak and leather armor, holding a glowing bow, aiming pose, soft studio lighting, transparent background, game asset, isolated subject, high detail, 4K --ar 1:1 --style raw --v 6

examples.name: Demon Mage (Epic)
examples.prompt: 3D render of a fantasy mage character, demon faction, epic quality, male with horns and red skin, wearing dark robes with glowing runes, holding a staff with crystal orb, casting spell pose, magical aura, soft studio lighting, transparent background, game asset, isolated subject, high detail, 4K --ar 1:1 --style raw --v 6

item_icon.template: 3D render of a fantasy {item_type}, {material} material, {rarity} quality, {description}, glowing edges, soft studio lighting, transparent background, game item icon, isolated subject, centered, high detail --ar 1:1 --style raw --v 6

examples.name: Legendary Sword
examples.prompt: 3D render of a fantasy sword, mythril material, legendary quality, ornate golden hilt with dragon engraving, blade glowing with blue fire, soft studio lighting, transparent background, game item icon, isolated subject, centered, high detail --ar 1:1 --style raw --v 6

examples.name: Health Potion
examples.prompt: 3D render of a fantasy health potion bottle, glass material, common quality, round flask with red glowing liquid inside, cork stopper, soft studio lighting, transparent background, game item icon, isolated subject, centered, high detail --ar 1:1 --style raw --v 6

battle_background.template: Fantasy landscape {environment_type}, {time_of_day}, {mood}, atmospheric perspective, painterly style, rich colors, detailed environment, game background, 16:9 aspect ratio, no characters, no text --ar 16:9 --style raw --v 6

examples.name: Plains Battlefield
examples.prompt: Fantasy landscape green rolling plains, golden hour sunset, peaceful but epic mood, distant mountains, scattered wildflowers, atmospheric perspective, painterly style, rich colors, detailed environment, game background, 16:9 aspect ratio, no characters, no text --ar 16:9 --style raw --v 6

examples.name: Volcano Lair
examples.prompt: Fantasy landscape volcanic wasteland, night with lava glow, dangerous and intense mood, cracked ground with magma rivers, smoke and embers, atmospheric perspective, painterly style, rich colors, detailed environment, game background, 16:9 aspect ratio, no characters, no text --ar 16:9 --style raw --v 6

boss_creature.template: 3D render of a massive fantasy {creature_type} boss monster, {theme} theme, {rarity} boss, {description}, intimidating pose, dramatic lighting, transparent background, game boss asset, isolated subject, high detail, epic scale --ar 1:1 --style raw --v 6

examples.name: Fire Dragon Boss
examples.prompt: 3D render of a massive fantasy dragon boss monster, fire theme, legendary boss, red scales with magma cracks, wings spread wide, breathing fire, intimidating pose, dramatic lighting, transparent background, game boss asset, isolated subject, high detail, epic scale --ar 1:1 --style raw --v 6

ui_element.template: Fantasy game UI {element_type}, {style} style, {color_scheme}, ornate borders, metallic and gemstone details, transparent background, game UI asset, isolated, high detail --ar 1:1 --style raw --v 6

examples.name: Gold Button
examples.prompt: Fantasy game UI button, medieval style, gold and sapphire color scheme, ornate borders with dragon motifs, metallic shine, transparent background, game UI asset, isolated, high detail --ar 1:1 --style raw --v 6

batch_generation_workflow.note: This workflow was the original concept. For the current production pipeline (with QA gates, atlas slicing, chroma green removal, WebP export, and asset manifest updates), see docs/assets/03_PIPELINE/.
batch_generation_workflow.step_2: Create 5-10 prompts using template with consistent parameters
batch_generation_workflow.step_3: Generate in Midjourney with --s 250 for consistency
batch_generation_workflow.step_4: Review against style guide - reject off-style results. Formal QA gates: docs/assets/03_PIPELINE/00_QA_ACCEPTANCE_GATES.md
batch_generation_workflow.step_5: Upscale accepted images, remove background if needed (Photoshop/Remove.bg). For atlas-based production: slice and remove chroma green per docs/assets/03_PIPELINE/02_SPRITE_SLICING_SPEC.md
batch_generation_workflow.step_7: Convert to WebP with alpha channel, add to asset pipeline. Full pipeline: docs/assets/03_PIPELINE/01_ATLAS_TO_ASSET_PIPELINE.md
batch_generation_workflow.step_8: Update asset manifest in database and mark progress in docs/assets/05_REFERENCE/01_ASSET_CHECKLIST.md

free_ai_tools.note: Tool recommendations from initial planning. Current tooling split (which tool for which task with limits): docs/assets/03_PIPELINE/03_WORKFLOW_AND_TOOLS.md
